last_analyst_summary: Normal-mode follow-up to 2026-04-17 17:28Z run. All 5 change records (chg-20260417-1620-001..005) were fully analyzed in analysis-20260417-methodology-layer.json; supplementary finding added. Fetched live methodology.json and claim_index.json from john09289.github.io: of the 69 dome "confirmed" WINs, only 6 unique visible labels are classified in the public taxonomy; ZERO of those 6 land in the prospective_confirmed class the author himself reserves for genuine forecasts (4 retrospective_structural, 2 pending_contested, 1 supportive_nonunique counting WIN-058 sub-claims separately). The only prospective_confirmed tag in the entire published index is on pred-eclipse-tier3, which is a pending prediction, not a confirmed WIN. 63 of the 69 WINs remain unclassified. EXP-170 already enumerates each tagged WIN individually; this run added the aggregate count as a supplementary analysis record (analysis-20260417-1948-taxonomy-count.json) plus one optional minor-severity issue-proposal for a one-line kill-shot sentence. Counterpoint preserved: the 63 unclassified WINs may eventually carry prospective_confirmed tags as classification continues. Canary adjudication unchanged — still partial-rhetorical-adoption. changes_pending_analysis decremented 5 -> 0. No new WINs, no silent drops, no FAIL entries needed. ISS-1073 remains assigned-analyst pending decider pickup of yesterday's proposal-ISS-1073-resolution.json.
